name: Hot Buttered Rum ( MW )
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonmetal mug, stir together the brown sugar, butter or margarine, cinnamon and nutmeg.
2. Stir in the warm water.
3. Cook uncovered on high power for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until steaming hot.
4. Stir in the rum.
5. Garnish with lemon slices, if desired.
